case_title: FAISAL AL QASIMI VS. DARREN MELANDER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARC SEIDENFELD. 506. PLAINTIFF FAISAL AL QASIMI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AL QASIMI, FAISAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MELANDER, DARREN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
